---
title: "EDA"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
# Load the necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(forecast)
library(knitr)
```
### Load the Harmonized Data
```{r data loading, include=TRUE}
# Load the harmonized data
macro_df <- read_csv("../data/macro_panel_wide_raw.csv")|>
  drop_na()|>
  glimpse()
```
```{r}
raw_ts <- ts(macro_df, start = c(1977,1), end = c(2025, 10), frequency = 4)
```
